description_long: This is a medieval-style beer tankard with a cylindrical wooden body, reinforced by two wide, dark metallic bands at the top and bottom. The front features a prominent, embossed metallic wolf head emblem, giving it a rugged and fantasy-inspired appearance. The handle is robust, angular, and made of the same dark metal, adorned with engraved patterns for added detail. The back of the tankard is plain wood, while the handle's attachment point is decorated with intricate metallic engravings. The interior appears to be lined with metal, suggesting durability and suitability for holding liquids. The overall finish is slightly worn, with visible wood grain and subtle scuffs, enhancing its authentic, well-used look.
description: A medieval-style wooden beer tankard with dark metal bands, a wolf head emblem, and an engraved metal handle. The design is rugged and detailed, with a fantasy-inspired aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wolf head emblem, wood grain, and the full metal handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the engraved metal handle attachment and plain wooden back.
description_view_2: Side view with the wolf head emblem visible and the handle extending to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing only the plain wooden surface and the edge of the handle.
attribute_graphic_design: The exterior features a large, embossed metallic wolf head emblem on a wooden background, with engraved patterns on the metal bands and handle. The design is bold and medieval, with no visible text or modern branding.
